title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 20 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 20 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 20 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/05/2025
Today, DCE Iron Ore futures continued to open lower and then rebounded slightly, with the most-traded contract I2509 eventually closingat 725, up 0.28% for the day. Traders' enthusiasm for selling was moderate. Steel trading was active today, with steel mills quoting higher prices and procurement volumes also increasing.
